name: @ai-native-solutions/fallgarden-sdk
description: Sovereign, file-based second brain toolkit. Markdown + wikilinks + tags + graph + backlinks + full-text search. Extracted verbatim from FallGarden.

scripts.test:
node -e "import('./src/index.js').then(m => { const v = new m.Vault(); v.put('A.md', '# A

Links to [[B]] and has #idea tag.'); v.put('B.md', '# B

Back to [[A]].'); console.log('render:', v.render('A.md').slice(0,120)); console.log('graph:', v.graph()); console.log('backlinks:', v.backlinks('B.md')); console.log('search:', v.search('idea')); })"
